purpose: Starter fixtures for conversational vault initialization and file-boundary discipline.

input.user_prompt: We just installed the framework into a new B2B analytics app. Help me bootstrap the vault by interviewing me and then write down the project's purpose, main services, Postgres plus Redis architecture, TypeScript conventions, and deployment constraints. There is no active plan yet.

must_include: a short conversational intake that reuses the context already present in the prompt
updates targeted at vault/shared/ files only
an explicit note that no plan-scoped files were created because no slug is known
must_not: dump generic filler into every vault file

input.user_prompt: Bootstrap the vault for our checkout reliability work. The current plan slug is 2026-03-20-checkout-reliability. Through a short conversation, capture project-wide Node and observability conventions plus this plan's scope, stakeholders, and rollout risks.

must_include: project-wide conventions mapped to vault/shared/ files
plan-specific framing mapped to vault/plans/2026-03-20-checkout-reliability/context.md or related plan-scoped files
clear reasoning for why each note is shared or plan-scoped
must_not: store rollout risks only in shared files when they are specific to the active initiative
rewrite the plan doc or add milestone logic

input.user_prompt: Please talk to me about our platform and then turn that into whatever vault notes and milestone plan you think we need.

must_include: an explicit boundary note that milestone planning stays in the plan doc workflow
must_not: claim the vault replaces canonical planning
